allow: Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('routes:'\); [print\(' ', r.methods, r.path\) for r in app.routes]")
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.main import app; print\('OK'\); [print\(' ', sorted\(list\(r.methods\)\) if hasattr\(r,'methods'\) else '-', r.path\) for r in app.routes]")
